item.copper.name: Copper Fishing Net
item.copper.description: A basic fishing net. Cast it by hand or leave it in water for later harvest.
item.iron.name: Iron Fishing Net
item.iron.description: A sturdier fishing net that can catch more fish at once.
item.gold.name: Gold Fishing Net
item.gold.description: An efficient fishing net suited for higher-quality catches.
item.iridium.name: Iridium Fishing Net
item.iridium.description: A top-tier fishing net that is light and efficient.
mail.copper: I hear you have been studying the water more closely. Come by the shop. I have an idea for you.   -Willy
mail.iron: Your copper net has proved itself. Try making an iron net; it should help you gather experience faster.   -Willy
mail.gold: If you are chasing better quality, a gold net is the next step. Keep going.   -Willy
mail.iridium: Real mastery comes from practicing through every season. The iridium net recipe is yours now.   -Willy
dialogue.willy.intro: Fishing is not just one method. Try a fishing net and you may learn the water in a different way.
